response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a solid understanding of the different types of fake content, such as bots, propaganda, and disinformation. This knowledge will enable you to recognize when you are interacting with fake content, and take appropriate action. For example, if you notice that a post or account seems too good (or bad) to be true, it may be a sign that it is fake. In such cases, it is best to verify the information through reputable sources before sharing or engaging further. Additionally, using fact-checking tools and features provided by social media platforms can help identify and flag potentially false content. It is also essential to be mindful of your own online behavior and avoid contributing to the spread of misinformation. By being informed and proactive, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media and protect yourself and others from its negative consequences."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a solid understanding of the different types of fake content, such as bots, propaganda, and disinformation. This knowledge will enable you to recognize when you are interacting with fake content, and take appropriate action. For example, if you notice that a post or account seems too good (or bad) to be true, it may be a sign that it is fake. In such cases, it is best to verify the information through reputable sources before sharing or engaging further. Additionally, using fact-checking tools and features provided by social media platforms can help identify and flag potentially false content. It is also essential to be mindful of your own online behavior and avoid contributing to the spread of misinformation. By being informed and proactive, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media and protect yourself and others from its negative consequences.
